rag_rules: Place data constraint assumptions inside annex agree blocks at component type level when bounds or visible relations are provided.
Use visible identifiers from the component scope for AGREE contract expressions.
generic_rules: Declare helper equations with explicit types matching the expression result.
Use boolean helper equations for range checks in AGREE contracts.
Structure AGREE annex blocks with clear assumption/guarantee separation.
Ensure all visible symbols referenced in AGREE contracts are declared in the component scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions are typically placed at component type level; assignments at implementation level.
Helper equations must declare their return type explicitly.
anti_patterns: Do not reference undeclared or non-visible identifiers in AGREE contracts.
Avoid placing implementation-specific assignments in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
